scripts.dev:restart: pnpm run dev:stop && pnpm run dev
scripts.hostinger:build: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@11.9.0 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
